title: Why You're Not Getting Fitter Despite Training Harder
excerpt: You hit the gym five days a week but feel worse, not better. Your body doesn't build muscle during exercise—it builds muscle during recovery.

title: Digital Boundaries: How to Use Technology Without Letting It Use You
excerpt: Learn how to create mindful technology boundaries that protect your attention, reduce anxiety, and help you reconnect with what matters most in a distracted world.

title: Why Your Morning Coffee Might Be Sabotaging Your Sleep
excerpt: You finish your last cup at 2 PM. So why are you still wired at 11 PM? The answer lies in caffeine's true half-life.
